title: 8 killed after B-52 bomber crashes at Edwards Air Force Base in California, US Air Force launches investigation | Video
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   A B-52 bomber crashed at Edwards Air Force Base in California, killing 8 people.
*   The incident occurred at the US Air Force base located in California.
*   The US Air Force has initiated an investigation into the crash.

title: Bank of Japan hikes rate to 31-year high, citing inflation
content:
The Bank of Japan (BOJ) has increased its interest rate.
*   This hike brings the rate to a 31-year high.
*   The decision was made in response to rising inflation.

title: Razorpay files confidential draft papers with Sebi for proposed Rs 5,000-6,000 cr IPO
content:
Razorpay has filed confidential draft papers for an Initial Public Offering (IPO).
*   The filing was made with Sebi, India's market regulator.
*   The proposed IPO is estimated to be in the range of Rs 5,000-6,000 crore.

title: Are cartoons in NCERT textbooks proper? Supreme Court asks retired judge panel to review
content:
The appropriateness of cartoons in NCERT textbooks is under review.
*   The Supreme Court has intervened in the matter.
*   A panel of retired judges has been appointed to conduct this review.
